# Zeeshan Hameed

> Zeeshan Hameed is a senior AI engineer who builds production health and fitness AI: clinical platforms, multi-model LLM systems, and cross-platform apps that ship and hold up. He is the founder of Auxon AI and the engineer behind Jema, CuePilates, and DietTalk.

Zeeshan Hameed is a senior AI engineer with a B.S. in Artificial Intelligence, Top Rated Plus on Upwork, based in Pakistan. He builds production-grade AI for health and fitness founders, end to end: web, backend, mobile, and the AI itself. His thesis: the demo is easy; production is the hard 80%, the auth, payments, security, and scale that break under real use.

## Case studies
- Jema: a clinical AI platform for Korean medicine, in daily use by doctors. Multi-model AI reports with automatic fallback, a unified patient index, SSO across the product suite, and encrypted patient-data handling. https://r-zeeshan.dev/work/jema
- Dr. Aigent: a multi-model clinical AI that turns doctors' notes into structured SOAP reports, with automatic model fallback. https://r-zeeshan.dev/work/dr-aigent
- CuePilates: an AI Pilates class-planning SaaS, taken from idea to launch in under a month, live at https://app.cuepilates.fit https://r-zeeshan.dev/work/cuepilates
- DietTalk: a doctor-supervised diet and weight app, a Flutter mobile app plus a doctor web portal with OCR lab-result extraction, live on the App Store and Google Play. https://r-zeeshan.dev/work/diettalk

## About
- Full profile and story: https://r-zeeshan.dev/about
- Founder of Auxon AI, his studio: https://auxonai.com

## Work with Zeeshan
- The Production Sprint: a working prototype in two weeks, then a phased build to production. https://auxonai.com
- Book a discovery call: https://calendly.com/rzeeshan
